_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Problem definition and shaping involves leading the framing of a problem characterised by high complexity, complication, or risk so that a solution can be created; coaching others in defining problems and describing appropriate options for solutions; helping others challenge requirements and assumptions, and identify opportunities when defining problems and solution options.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and problems that can be solved more simply and reliably with rule-based logic or statistical methods.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-001 (AI, cosine: 0.295), DQ-T-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.268).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.7/10 (raw 0.272). Shared vocabulary: [problems]. DDaT-only terms [appropriate, assumptions, challenge, characterised, coaching, complexity] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.844, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 51-word DDaT element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.3%). "Problem definition and shaping involves leading the framing of a problem charact" and "Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and proble" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.359 > STS 0.272 (gap +0.087). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [problems] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [problems]. DDaT-only: [appropriate, assumptions, challenge, characterised, coaching, complexity]. WIDAI-only: [ability, based, distinguish, learning, logic, machine].
